name: Dynamic Skate Warm-up
purpose: Prepare ankles, hips, and skating posture.
setup: Open space with two markers 10 yards apart.
instructions: Finish with controlled skips and arm drive.

name: Head-up Stickhandle Box
purpose: Control the puck while scanning the environment.
setup: Make a small box with four cones and place pucks inside.
instructions: Handle the puck with soft hands.
Call out a color or number every few seconds.
progression: Use a smaller box or faster callouts.
regression: Use a ball and slower pace.
safetyNotes: Keep the area clear of loose equipment.

name: Quick Feet 5-10-5
purpose: Build strong direction changes and acceleration.
setup: Place three cones in a line, five yards apart.
instructions: Sprint five yards and touch the line.
Sprint ten yards across, touch, and finish through the middle.
regression: Practice each turn at half speed.
safetyNotes: Wear shoes with grip and use a flat surface.

name: Four-Corner Target Shooting
purpose: Improve shot accuracy with a balanced release.
setup: Set four safe targets in a net or shooting tarp.
instructions: Take ten shots at each called target.
safetyNotes: Only shoot into a secured net or tarp with a clear area.

name: Recovery Mobility
purpose: Lower heart rate and restore easy movement.
setup: Use a mat or clear floor space.
instructions: Move through ankle, hip, and upper-back mobility.
safetyNotes: Stop any movement that causes pain.
